hypothesis: Tune learning_rate to 0.035 with num_leaves=256 and Tweedie variance power=1.5. Previous best run (exp_0033) used lr=0.04 and scored 0.94488. Experiments with Tweedie 1.2 at various lr/num_leaves all plateaued around 0.94513. Returning to Tweedie 1.5 (which gave the best score) with a slight lr reduction to 0.035 to allow better convergence while keeping num_leaves=256. This targets the best known configuration with a fine-grained lr sweep.
